subcodes.first_line: Hearken thou unto the melody of Glory in the ocean of faithfulness, if ye be of them that are steadfast, and turn not unto anyone [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان استمعی تغنی البهاء فی طمطام الوفا ان کنتم من القانتات و لا تلتقی الی احد
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @chastisement and requital, @knowledge; recognition of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
